tools.name: scan_site
tools.description: Recommended first call. Starts or reuses a public-web scan, reports freshness and anonymous quota decisions, and waits up to 45 seconds by default. If still running, use get_scan_status; otherwise use get_scan_bundle. Completed no-go scans retain completed_limited status and reason-specific guidance

tools.name: get_scan_status
tools.description: Retrieve terminal status, including completed_limited no-go disposition and reason-specific guidance. Pass jobId only before a stable scanId is available.

tools.name: get_scan_bundle
tools.description: Recommended second call after scan_site. Returns the canonical scan state, compact report summary, findings, bounded evidence summary, and pre-consent inventory in one agent-friendly response.
